channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Wall Street doubts Kevin Warsh can fulfill President Trump's expectations
item.description: Key information to know before starting your workday.

item.title: Job-hopping is now the fastest route to becoming a CEO, and loyalty may hold you back
item.description: A boundaryless career is now the most reliable path to the corner office, reflecting how employers have changed their views on loyalty.

item.title: Berkshire Hathaway investor admits being wrong about Greg Abel, says he's a better fit than Buffett now
item.description: Berkshire's new CEO is not Warren Buffett, and that is exactly what the company needs at this time.

item.title: The deficit grew by $955 billion in seven months, prompting calls for a constitutional budget fix.
item.description: Interest payments have reached $628 billion, and past congressional efforts have failed, leading to support for a constitutional amendment.
